questionHtml: Deduce the ionic equation, including state symbols, for the reaction of hydrogen chloride gas with water.
markschemeHtml:
H2O (l) + HCl (g) → Cl− (aq) + H3O+ (aq) ✓✓

 

One for the equation and one for the state symbols.
Do not accept H2O (l) + H+(g)→ H3O+(aq)
Do not accept equilibrium sign.

meta.title: Deduce the ionic equation, including state symbols, for the reaction of hydrogen chloride gas with water.
breadcrumbLabels: 1.1 Introduction to the particulate nature of matter and chemical change
